versions.change_description: Rolled back to "Current Base Website Build" (v2)

In a professional looking manner consistent with the professional look, feel and style of the website, add a navigation bar at the top of the page with four links: Home, CV, Terms & Conditions, and Privacy Policy. Each link should anchor-scroll to its section on the page. Style it consistently with the rest of the site.

Please make three CSS fixes to the navigation bar:
1. The ElevenLabs voice widget is overlapping the navbar. Add a CSS rule so the elevenlabs-convai element has a top margin of 55px to push it below the navbar.
2. When clicking a nav link the destination section scrolls under the navbar and the top of the content is hidden. Fix this by adding scroll-margin-top: 65px to the #home, #cv, #terms, and #privacy sections. This tells the browser to stop scrolling 65px above each section so it lands visibly below the navbar.
3. On mobile screens the navbar links wrap onto two lines making it taller. Add a media query for max-width 700px that increases scroll-margin-top to 110px on all four sections.
Do not change any colours, fonts, layout, or content — only these three CSS additions.

Please verbosely comment all changes for easy troubleshooting and possible necessary manual fine tuning at a later date.
Add flex-wrap: wrap to the .navbar CSS rule so the navigation links can wrap onto a second line on very narrow screens instead of overflowing. Do not change anything else.

In the base body CSS rule (not inside any media query), change the top padding from 200px to 70px. This reduces the excessive gap between the navbar and the page content on mobile screens. Do not change the right, bottom, or left padding values, and do not touch the desktop media query. Only change the top value in the base body rule.

Change the scroll-margin-top media query breakpoint from max-width 700px to max-width 900px, so the increased 110px scroll-margin-top applies across all mobile and tablet widths where the navbar is in its compact form. Do not change the 110px value itself.  Please verbosely comment all changes for easy troubleshooting and possible necessary manual fine tuning at a later date.

Inside the existing max-width 900px media query, add a rule setting the body padding-top to 190px. This ensures the page title appears below the collapsed ElevenLabs voice widget on mobile screens. Do not change the base body rule, do not touch the desktop min-width 900px media query, and do not change any other padding values — only add body padding-top: 190px inside the existing max-width 900px block.  Verbosely comment.

Update Dr. Sabina Nasir's CV with the following information (keeping with the current look, feel, style and professionalism of the site):

BDS, Dip Clinical Dentisty( Eastman Dental.Institute, London)
MFDS RCS London,
MSc Fixed and Removable Prosthodontics( King's College London)
Postgraduate Certificate in  Implant Dentisty
GDC number- 169400

In a manner that is seamlessly  and professionally integrated into the site in accordance with the  professional look, feeling and style of  the site, Add this image of Benedict Williams, COO to a new section called "Our Team" : https://teckel-io.github.io/drsn/assets/benedict.png (be sure to include the new section in the navigation bar)

In a manner that is seamlessly  and professionally integrated into the site in accordance with the  professional look, feeling and style of  the site, Add this image of Patricia Peterson, Dental Hygienist to the section called "Our Team" : https://teckel-io.github.io/drsn/assets/dr-nassir-webmaster.jpg (including brief role description) just below Benedict Williams, COO.

The navigation bar now wraps onto two lines on narrow mobile screens (narrower than 467px wide). This makes the bar taller, and the voice widget and all page content need to move down by 20 pixels on those narrow screens only — desktop screens should not be affected. Please add a new CSS media query for screens with max-width 467px that does three things: (1) increases the margin-top on the elevenlabs-convai element from 50px to 70px, (2) increases the body padding-top from 235px to 255px, and (3) increases the scroll-margin-top on the #home, #cv, #team, #terms, and #privacy anchors from 235px to 255px. Add full explanatory comments to every value as per the existing comment style in the file.
list revisions
remove the "revisions" section from the bottom of the website

A PDF document has been uploaded to the site assets folder. File URL: https://teckel-io.github.io/drsn/assets/dhr-2024-final.pdf. User instruction: In a professional manner seamlessly integrate, in accordance with the look and feel of the site, this PDF file below the Privacy Policy. Embed the  file into the site so it is easily seen, and also provide a download link.. Please update the website based on the instruction. Embed the PDF inline using an <iframe> tag (width 100%, height 600px) so visitors can read it on the page. Also add a clearly labelled download link below the iframe. Use the exact URL provided for both.

In a way that smoothly and seamlessly integrates with the Services page adhering to the  look, feel, style  and overall professionalism of the site, please add the following data in the area of the services.html page concerning pricing:

Consultation & Diagnostics
New Patient Assessment: £80 – £135 (Includes full examination, oral cancer screening, and basic X-rays)

Routine Check-up (Existing Patient): £55 – £75

Specialist/Implant Consultation: Free (as noted by Delapre Dental Care) or up to £135 for complex planning.

Large X-ray (OPG) or 3D Bone Scan (CT): £60 – £150

Preventative & Hygiene
Hygienist Appointment (30–40 mins): £75 – £110

Advanced Periodontal (Gum) Treatment: £150 – £300 per session

Advanced Prosthodontics (MSc Level Expertise)
These procedures are the core of Dr. Nasir's postgraduate training from King’s College London.

Porcelain/Zirconia Crown: £850 – £1,200 (Precision-crafted to match natural teeth)

Porcelain Veneer: £900 – £1,200 per tooth

Bridges (per unit): £700 – £1,000 (e.g., a 3-unit bridge would be £2,100+)

Full Acrylic Dentures (Upper or Lower): £800 – £1,700

Cobalt Chrome Dentures: £1,150 – £1,950 (High-strength metal-base dentures)

Dental Implants
Specialized services provided by a dentist with a Postgraduate Certificate in the field.

Single Implant (Placement only): £1,250 – £1,800

Single Implant (Fully Restored with Crown): £2,800 – £3,600

Implant-Retained Bridge (3+ teeth): £5,000 – £8,000

All-on-4 / Full Arch Reconstruction: £14,000 – £18,000 per arch

General Restorative & Oral Surgery
White Composite Fillings: £150 – £325 (Depending on size and complexity)

Root Canal Treatment (Molar): £600 – £950 (Advanced equipment like microscopes often used)

Simple Extraction: £150 – £200

Surgical/Complex Extraction: £300 – £500
